generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoderAxis1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor position encoder mounted directly on the motor for Axis 1"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DataTransmittedMotorEncoderAxis1
]

instance GearboxEncoderAxis1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind gearbox for Axis 1"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DataTransmittedGearboxEncoderAxis1
]

instance DataTransmittedMotorEncoderAxis1 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderAxis1
]

instance DataTransmittedGearboxEncoderAxis1 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoderAxis1
]

instance DataMotorEncoderAxis1 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from motor encoder for Axis 1"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DataTransmittedMotorEncoderAxis1
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol, SimulinkSimulation
]

instance DataGearboxEncoderAxis1 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from gearbox encoder for Axis 1"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DataTransmittedGearboxEncoderAxis1
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol, SimulinkSimulation
]

instance ContextualData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Contextual data traces from physical systems aggregated for specific purposes"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DataMotorEncoderAxis1, DataGearboxEncoderAxis1
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance SysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML model for system structure and behavior across abstraction levels"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModeling
]

instance SimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for multi-physics simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance ACMEModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACME Architecture Description Language for components, interfaces, interconnections"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance AADLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AADL Architecture Description Language for components, interfaces, interconnections"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance MontiArcModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton for behavioral modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for standardized asset modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance SysMLModeling : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for model-based systems engineering across requirements, functional, and logical architecture layers"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance SimulinkSimulation : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for multi-physics simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyOptimizationService
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance RFLPMethodology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RFLP methodology for hierarchical system decomposition"
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService
]

instance OOSEMFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OOSEM framework for structured functional architecture development"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance SPESFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SPES framework for logical architecture development"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization via dashboard interfaces for manufacturing engineers and maintenance personnel"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance JointFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction for predictive maintenance"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParametersInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy optimization through closed-loop control"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionOptimizationAction
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization providing real-time system status and performance metrics"
]

instance FrictionParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Derived friction parameters to enhance robot control accuracy"
]

instance MotionOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Closed-loop control for motion accuracy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ManufacturingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "High-precision industrial manufacturing environment requiring accurate motion control and real-time monitoring"
    base:contains RobotSystem
]

instance RobotSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Serial robot MABI MAX 100 with six axes from MABI Robotic AG, featuring drive train (motors, gear transmissions, cycloidal gears), controlled by Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller"
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotorAxis1 : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving first axis"
]

instance GearTransmissionAxis1 : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission for first axis"
]

instance CycloidalGearAxis1 : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gear for first axis"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIKController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for precise actuation"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system employs a UML class diagram-based Digital Shadow Reference Model (Fig. 1) with components including Asset, Model, Processing, and DataTrace. Key associations are Asset has DataTrace, Processing uses Model, and DataTrace originates from Processing. The concrete realization in Section IV specifies these elements and their relationships for a specific use case, ensuring traceability of data traces back to their generating processing components and models."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The communication protocol is MQTT; however, details on network topology, bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability and redundancy mechanisms, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Data exchange occurs via MQTT protocol for sensor data streaming, integration with Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller as an external system, and implementation of Asset Administration Shells (AAS) to ensure interoperability with enterprise systems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system adheres to industry standards including SysML for model-based systems engineering, AADL for architecture description, ACME for component-based modeling, and MontiArc for architectural descriptions. These standards facilitate interoperability among heterogeneous stakeholders and tools, as referenced in the document's discussion on integrating diverse perspectives [31]."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The documents reference a physical safety cell as a safety measure within the automation pyramid framework, but do not elaborate on cybersecurity protocols, access controls, authentication systems, threat mitigation strategies, fail-safe mechanisms, risk assessment approaches, or safety-critical system considerations."
]
